title: lucuma lasiocarpa
intro: Lucuma lasiocarpa, also known as the Andean lucuma, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae, native to the Andean region of South America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Lucuma lasiocarpa include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and even exhibit anti-cancer properties. Lucuma lasiocarpa can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used as a natural remedy in traditional Andean medicine.
